problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: If Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering is applied to types, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
